name: open-design-run-context
intent: Retrofit Open Design's composer context sources (#4869) into Sonik Agent UI as user-visible, per-turn-persisted run context selection. Behavior translated to Svelte 5 runes; no JSX copied.

sources.role: kind label / detail-line helper discipline (mirrored, not copied)
chip hover card UX (kind label + detail line)

behavioralLessonsFromCommitTrail: local context removal must be authoritative (user-removed chips stay removed)
preserve context across workdir change / clear / send
fail loudly on missing/unresolvable context paths rather than silently dropping

notes: Svelte 5 runes throughout; no React/JSX copied.
Authoritative removal is a pure, unit-tested contract function (reconcile/add/remove) rather than ad-hoc component state, so removal survives reseed, send, and reload by construction.

Explicit selection wins over implicit host/page context at the server boundary: a deselected document chip is neither injected nor exposed to the agent for that turn; a dismissal is treated as explicit intent even when the item list is otherwise empty.
Absent selection degrades gracefully to the prior implicit-context behavior.
Selection persists on the Phase 1 run record (new nullable context_selection jsonb column) — the run is the per-turn persisted object, so provenance and reload rehydration read from it.

targets.content: AgentRunContextSelection + AgentContextItem (kinds document|artifact|booking-context|page|command-family|runtime-skill), agentContextKindLabel / agentContextDetailLine helpers, and the authoritative reconcile/add/remove + parse + resolve functions. Exposed via the @sonik-agent-ui/tool-contracts/run-context subpath export (barrel kept single-file so Node type-stripping tests still resolve src).
Context chip + hover card (kind label + detail line); read-only variant used for message provenance.
Plus-menu popover to attach context sources, grouped by kind, click-outside/Escape close.
Additive context bar (plus-menu + chips) above the textarea; renders the plain composer when no context props are wired.
Threads context props to the composer and a messageContext resolver to AgentMessage.
Renders the persisted selection as read-only provenance chips on a past user turn.
deriveAgentContextCandidates: auto-seeds (current page + active document) and the attachable catalog (artifact, booking entity, command families, runtime skills).

Selection state (runes), reconcile-on-context-change effect (authoritative removal), attach/remove handlers, sends contextSelection with the generate request, per-turn provenance capture, and rehydration from persisted runs on reload.

Parses the explicit selection, layers it over implicit page context (applyRunContextSelectionToPageContext), gates active-document injection on the selection, and persists the selection on the run via startRunRecorder.
startRunRecorder accepts contextSelection and persists it on the run record via createRun.
WorkspaceRunContextSelection type + nullable context_selection on WorkspaceRunRecord, threaded through the in-memory and cloud SQL createRun/select/mapper paths.
Additive nullable context_selection jsonb column on agent_workspace_runs (registered in scripts/run-postgres-migrations.mjs).

doNotCopy: React component code (translated behavior to Svelte, not JSX)
open-design daemon filesystem materialization (ProjectReferenceModal dir linking) — Sonik has no local-fs projects
design-files / design-system / terminal / side-chat kinds — no Sonik equivalent yet

verification.asserts: kind labels/detail-line discipline; reconcile keeps manual + honors dismissals; authoritative removal survives reseed (idempotent/reload-safe); re-add clears dismissal; parse bounds/drops malformed; server resolution — explicit wins, dismissal-only is still explicit, document not re-injected after removal.
only current page + active document auto-seed; full attachable catalog covers all six kinds; stable ids; empty context yields no candidates.

attach document chip -> send -> selection recorded on the run and consumed (document included); remove auto-seeded chip -> stays removed after next send AND after simulated reload (rehydrate from persisted run).
svelte-check clean (0 errors) across the app.

verification.check: existing booking intake + run lifecycle smokes unchanged
verification.asserts: additive changes; implicit-context fallback preserved when no selection is sent.

dependsOn: G001-run-lifecycle-hardening (selection persists onto run records; branched off feat/run-lifecycle-hardening-20260701)
